home.heroSubtitle: In Panama, we noticed an invisible barrier: students fall behind not only from language or missing information, but also from fatigue and limited support resources. Heartitude responds with school learning support, care-space learning support, and BioRhythm tools that make routines and learning materials easier to access.
home.bannerText: Practical support that keeps learning continuous—at school and in care spaces.
home.pathSubtitle: How we help students navigate their educational journey.
home.track1Sub: Public school support + School Start Pack
home.missionTileDesc: A student-led service club supporting learning and care.
home.involvedTileDesc: Volunteer with us or partner to bring packs to your community.

about.heroSubtitle: A student-led service club supporting learning and care.
about.missionText1: Heartitude is a blend of 'Heart' + 'Attitude'—showing up with empathy, consistency, and practical problem-solving. In Panama, we observed that learning gaps often come from a mix of missing school-system information, language barriers, fatigue, and limited support resources.
about.missionText2: We respond through two service tracks—School Learning Support and Care-Space Learning Support—powered by BioRhythm, a student-built measurement-and-checklist approach that helps identify simple, low-cost improvements (lighting, noise, routines) and keeps learning continuous.
about.whyText: We noticed that students in two very different settings—under-resourced schools and hospitals—faced a similar challenge: a lack of continuity and accessible guidance. Heartitude was born from the idea that simple, practical tools combined with consistent human support can connect these dots.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Making support easy to find and use.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.desc: Understanding the unique challenges of each student.

programs.heroSubtitle: Targeted support for two distinct communities with shared needs for guidance and continuity.
programs.bioText: We measure simple environmental signals (noise, light, temperature) and study signals (study time, reaction time, accuracy) to create the Focus Forecast + Study Checklist. This helps us recommend low-cost improvements like lighting placement, quiet corners, and better time-slot distribution.
programs.schoolDesc: Focused on elementary math and middle/high school English support, helping students navigate school requirements with confidence.
schoolActivities: • Elementary Math + Middle/High English learning support.
schoolPackItems: • Key contacts list & weekly routine planner.
programs.careDesc: Bringing learning moments into care settings with calm routines and adaptable support.
careActivities: • Learning support adapted for care settings.

resources.heroSubtitle: Free materials for students, families, and schools.

impact.heroSubtitle: Measuring the difference we make in students' lives.
impact.comingSoonText: We are currently collecting data from our pilot programs. Check back soon to see how Heartitude is changing lives through tutoring and guidance kits.

getInvolved.partnerDesc: Schools, NGOs, and care centers can request School Start Guide & Care-Space packs and implementation guides.
